name: Launch Checklist
description: A go-to-market launch plan as a single Epic with pre-launch, day-of, and post-launch tasks as linked child issues, so engineering, marketing, and support are all working off the same checklist.

teams.name: Go-to-Market
teams.description: Coordinates cross-functional launch work across engineering, marketing, and support.

workflowStates.name: Blocked
workflowStates.description: Stuck on a dependency — see the blocker label.

labels.name: pre-launch
labels.description: Must be done before launch day.

issueTemplates.title: Launch: [Product Name] v1
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
## Launch date
[Target date]

## Launch tier
Major / Minor / Silent

## Success metrics
- Signups in week 1
- Press/social mentions
- Activation rate of new signups from this launch

issueTemplates.title: Feature flag rollout plan (0% → 10% → 50% → 100%)
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Define the rollout stages and the rollback trigger conditions at each stage.

issueTemplates.title: Write and schedule the launch blog post
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Draft due 3 days before launch; scheduled to publish at 9am launch day.

issueTemplates.title: Update pricing page and in-app upgrade prompts
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Ensure the new capability is reflected wherever pricing/plan gating is shown.

issueTemplates.title: Brief support team + publish an internal FAQ
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Support needs to know what's changing before customers start asking.

issueTemplates.title: Flip the feature flag to 100% and watch dashboards
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: War-room channel open for the first 2 hours post-flip. Rollback plan: flip flag back to 0%, no deploy needed.

issueTemplates.title: Post launch announcement on X / LinkedIn / Product Hunt
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Coordinate timing with the blog post going live.

issueTemplates.title: Set up a status-page / monitoring dashboard for the new feature
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Track error rate and latency for the new code path specifically, separate from the aggregate dashboard.

issueTemplates.title: Send the week-1 launch retro and metrics readout
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Signups, activation, error rate, and qualitative feedback from support/sales.

views.name: Launch Checklist
views.description: The full checklist grouped by pre-launch / day-of / post-launch.

views.name: Launch Timeline
views.description: Every task plotted against the launch date, so slippage is visible immediately.

views.name: Launch Board
views.description: Working board for the launch team, grouped by status.
